name: TrackMyOrder
description: Customer wants to track their Virgin Media order or delivery — they want to know where it is, whether it's been dispatched, when it will arrive, or they need a tracking number or reference. This is a neutral status enquiry about delivery progress, not a report of a delivery problem.

sampleUtterances.utterance: Where is my order?
Can I get a {trackingReferenceType} for my delivery?
Track my {trackProductType} delivery
Has my {trackProductType} been dispatched yet?
When will my {trackProductType} be delivered?
I want to check the status of my order
Can you send me the {trackingReferenceType} for my delivery?
Has my order been shipped?
Where can I find my {trackingReferenceType} ?
I'm expecting a {trackProductType} — when should it arrive?
Is my {trackProductType} out for delivery today?
I haven't received a {trackingReferenceType} for my order yet
How do I track my order with Yodel?
Can you check where my {trackProductType} delivery is?
I ordered a {trackProductType} — has it left the warehouse?
What's the estimated delivery date for my {trackProductType} ?
My {trackingReferenceType} isn't working — can you check the status for me?
I placed an order today — when will I get delivery updates?
Is there a way to see where my parcel is right now?
I want to know if my {trackProductType} has been sent
When will I get my {trackProductType} ?
track my order
